testcase.name: @BeforeClass setUp
testcase.failure:
org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Cannot start the 'com.lfx.app' application. Consider checking the driver's troubleshooting documentation. Original error: Error executing adbExec. Original error: 'Command ''D:\Android\platform-tools\adb.exe' -P 5037 -s 192.168.1.17\:5555 shell am start-activity -W -n com.lfx.app/.LoginActivity -S -a android.intent.action.MAIN -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER -f 0x10200000' exited with code 1'; Command output: Stopping: com.lfx.app Starting: Intent { act=android.intent.action.MAIN cat=[android.intent.category.LAUNCHER] flg=0x10200000 cmp=com.lfx.app/.LoginActivity } Error type 3 Error: Activity class {com.lfx.app/com.lfx.app.LoginActivity} does not exist.

'21' Driver info: io.appium.java_client.android.AndroidDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[{appium:appActivity=.LoginActivity, appium:appPackage=com.lfx.app, appium:automationName=UiAutomator2, appium:deviceName=Android Device, appium:fullReset=false, appium:noReset=true, platformName=ANDROID, appium:udid=192.168.1.17:5555}],
